name: agent-workflow
description: Repo-backed phase/task workflow commands for agentic coding sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Durable phase/task workflow commands for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Agent Workflow helps coding agents build greenfield projects from specs by turning plans into phases, tasks, reviewable commits, and handoffs. It is command-first; optional advisory hooks can run deterministic checks but never commit, stash, or mutate workflow state.
defaultPrompt: Initialize the agent workflow in this project.
Check whether this is a context boundary.
